'''dhogakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:utilizable|utilizable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-g-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:utilizable|utilizable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhogakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || dhogakithi || dhogakiji || dhogakishi || dhogakiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || dhogakuthu || dhogakuju || dhogakushu || dhogakuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || dhogakuthu || dhogakuju || dhogakushu || dhogakuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || dhogakufthuf || dhogakufjuf || dhogakufshuf || dhogakufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || dhogakethe || dhogakeje || dhogakeshe || dhogakeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || dhogakotho || dhogakojo || dhogakosho || dhogakoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || dhogakotho || dhogakojo || dhogakosho || dhogakoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || dhogakofthof || dhogakofjof || dhogakofshof || dhogakofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhogakïfthïf || dhogakïfjïf || dhogakïfshïf || dhogakïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhogakïfthïf || dhogakïfjïf || dhogakïfshïf || dhogakïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhogakïfthïf || dhogakïfjïf || dhogakïfshïf || dhogakïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhogakïfthïf || dhogakïfjïf || dhogakïfshïf || dhogakïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || dhogakæthæ || dhogakæjæ || dhogakæshæ || dhogakækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || dhogakatha || dhogakaja || dhogakasha || dhogakaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || dhogakatha || dhogakaja || dhogakasha || dhogakaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || dhogakafthaf || dhogakafjaf || dhogakafshaf || dhogakafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || dhogakasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || dhogakshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || dhogakroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || dhogakmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || dhogakyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || godhogaknkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || godhogaknkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || godhogaknkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || godhogaknkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || dhogagakasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || dhogagakshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || dhogagakroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || dhogagakmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || dhogagakyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || godhogagaknkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || godhogagaknkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || godhogagaknkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || godhogagaknkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || dhegækasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || dhegækshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || dhegækroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || dhegækmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || dhegækyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || godhegæknkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || godhegæknkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || godhegæknkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || godhegæknkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || dhogfakasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || dhogfakshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || dhogfakroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || dhogfakmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || dhogfakyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || godhogfaknkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || godhogfaknkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || godhogfaknkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || godhogfaknkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
